messages.ui.applies.when.panel.size.set.custom: Only applies when Panel Size is set to Custom.
messages.ui.select.image.folder.single.root.conta:
Select image folder.

Single: root contains jpg/jpeg/png images directly.
Batch: root contains multiple subfolders, each with images.
Mixed layout is invalid.

messages.ui.error.input.path.not_directory: Input path is not a directory: {path}
messages.ui.error.kfx.plugin.required: KFX plugin reference cannot be empty.
messages.ui.error.jobs.must.be.positive: Parallel jobs must be greater than 0.
messages.ui.error.jpeg.quality.out.of.range: JPEG quality must be between 1 and 100.
messages.ui.error.page.layout.invalid: Page layout must be facing or single.
messages.ui.error.reading.direction.invalid: Reading direction must be rtl or ltr.
messages.ui.error.panel.movement.invalid: Panel movement must be vertical or horizontal.
messages.ui.error.single.output.must.match_suffix: Single-mode output path must end with {suffix}.
messages.ui.error.batch.output.must.be.directory: Batch-mode output must be a directory, not a single file.
messages.ui.error.output.location.unavailable: Cannot infer output location for the current directory state.
messages.ui.error.batch.no.processable.subdirs: No processable subfolders found in batch directory.
messages.ui.tip.title: Optional title in single mode; blank uses input folder name.
messages.ui.tip.shift: Facing first-page shift: prepend a blank page so the first real page lands in slot 2 for spread alignment.
messages.ui.tip.image.preset: Image processing preset: Neutral (no enhancement), Standard enhancement (recommended), Enhanced brightness (legacy style).
messages.ui.tip.crop.mode: Crop mode: Off disables crop; Smart single-page is conservative border trim; Facing linked crop keeps spread pages synchronized; Fill-height additionally trims inner white margins when safe.
messages.ui.tip.target.size: Fit single pages to a fixed canvas size, e.g. 1240x1860.
messages.ui.tip.preserve.color: Whether to preserve color pipeline; default follows image preset.
messages.ui.tip.gamma: Brightness gamma; 1.0 disables adjustment, 1.8 is a brighter legacy-style baseline.
messages.ui.tip.autocontrast: Whether to enable auto contrast; default follows image preset.
messages.ui.tip.autolevel: Whether to enable light black boost; default follows image preset.
messages.ui.tip.jpeg.quality: Output JPEG quality after processing; 90 is recommended for Scribe.
messages.ui.tip.template: Experimental/compat path: pass a Kindle Create exported .kpf/.zip template; leave blank to use built-in static assets.
messages.ui.tip.kfx.plugin: Plugin ID, plugin directory, or zip path; defaults to `img2kpf/plugins/kfx_output`.
messages.ui.tip.jobs: Parallel volume count in batch mode; 1 runs serially, >1 runs in parallel.
messages.ui.tip.reading.direction: Reading direction: rtl for right-to-left, ltr for left-to-right.
messages.ui.tip.page.layout: Page layout: facing creates spreads; single creates one page per section.
messages.ui.tip.panel.movement: Virtual Panels movement direction: vertical or horizontal.
